# Claude Code Analysis

> Deep dive into the internals of @anthropic-ai/claude-code v2.1.88 — 512,664 lines of TypeScript decoded.

This site provides an interactive analysis and learning platform for understanding Claude Code's internal architecture, tools, services, and agent execution loop. Source extracted from cli.js.map of the npm package. Internal codename: Tengu.

## Hard Numbers

- 512,664 lines of TypeScript (3x Linux kernel 1.0)
- 1,884 source files (.ts and .tsx)
- 43 built-in tools
- 101 slash commands
- 346 React components
- 110+ Zod schemas
- 284 feature flag checks across 109 files
- Largest file: cli/print.ts at 5,594 lines
- BashTool security alone: 300KB+ across 5 files

## Sections

- [Overview](https://cc.openonion.ai): Stats, core execution flow diagram, key innovations
- [Architecture](https://cc.openonion.ai/architecture): Directory structure, codebase size comparison, top 10 largest files, module breakdown, tech stack, data flow
- [Query Loop](https://cc.openonion.ai/query-loop): The core agentic state machine in query.ts (~1700 lines) — context projection, auto-compaction, API streaming, streaming tool execution, error recovery, continuation decisions
- [Tools](https://cc.openonion.ai/tools): 43 built-in tools with visual cards — BashTool (AST security, sandbox, ML classifier), FileEditTool (fuzzy find/replace), AgentTool (subagent spawning), MCPTool (external tools), and more
- [Permissions](https://cc.openonion.ai/permissions): 5-layer security system — input validation, tool-specific rules, ML "yoloClassifier", permission hooks, user UI dialog. 6 permission modes
- [Agents](https://cc.openonion.ai/agents): Subagent spawning with CacheSafeParams for zero-cost cache sharing, worktree isolation, remote execution, coordinator mode for multi-worker orchestration
- [Services](https://cc.openonion.ai/services): Compaction (4 strategies), MCP integration (470KB, 4 transports), LSP, analytics (Datadog + GrowthBook), memory extraction, streaming tool executor
- [Context & Memory](https://cc.openonion.ai/context): System prompt assembly (CLAUDE.md, git status, tools, env), auto-memory system, 4 memory types (user, feedback, project, reference), AppState store
- [File Map](https://cc.openonion.ai/file-map): Complete directory reference with key files, their line counts, and purposes
- [Fun Facts](https://cc.openonion.ai/fun-facts): Easter eggs, buddy pet system (18 species with hats and rarity tiers), wizard-themed comments, 160+ spinner verbs ("Clauding...", "Prestidigitating..."), tengu feature flags, Magic Docs, HackerOne references

## Key Architecture Concepts

### Query Loop (query.ts, ~1700 lines)
Async generator state machine: (1) context projection (snip, microcompact, collapse), (2) auto-compaction if threshold exceeded (effective_window - 13K buffer), (3) API streaming with concurrent StreamingToolExecutor, (4) error recovery cascade (collapse drain, reactive compact, max-token escalation 8K->64K, multi-turn max 3 attempts), (5) tool execution (read-only parallel up to 10, write serial), (6) attachment processing, (7) continuation decision via stop hooks.

### Tool System (Tool.ts, 43 tools)
Unified Tool<Input, Output, Progress> interface via buildTool() factory. Tools declare isConcurrencySafe(), isReadOnly(), isDestructive(). Orchestrator partitions into batches. BashTool is the largest (300KB+) with tree-sitter AST parsing, ML classifier ("yoloClassifier"), and HackerOne-tested security.

### Permission System (5 layers)
validateInput() -> checkPermissions() -> ML Classifier -> Hooks -> User UI. The ML classifier is internally called "yoloClassifier" (utils/permissions/yoloClassifier.ts). Function name for feature gates: checkStatsigFeatureGate_CACHED_MAY_BE_STALE() (48 characters). Analytics type: AnalyticsMetadata_I_VERIFIED_THIS_IS_NOT_CODE_OR_FILEPATHS.

### Agent System (AgentTool)
CacheSafeParams frozen at fork time enable zero-cost subagent spawning. Supports local (in-process), worktree (git isolation), and remote (CCR) modes. Coordinator mode orchestrates multiple workers via <task-notification> XML results.

### Compaction (4 strategies)
Microcompact (every API call), Autocompact (threshold trigger via forked agent, circuit breaker after 3 failures), History Snipping (feature-gated), Context Collapse (experimental incremental).

### Memory System (memdir/)
~/.claude/projects/<path>/memory/ with 4 types: user, feedback, project, reference. MEMORY.md index (200 lines max). Auto-extraction via background forked agent. Team memory variant for multi-agent shared knowledge.

### Hidden Features
- Buddy pet system: 18 species (duck, dragon, capybara, chonk...), 8 hats (crown, wizard, tinyduck), 6 eye styles, 5 rarity tiers. Species encoded as String.fromCharCode() to avoid build checker collisions.
- 160+ loading spinner verbs: "Clauding", "Prestidigitating", "Flibbertigibbeting", "Whatchamacalliting"
- Wizard-themed comment in query.ts about thinking rules: "Heed these rules well, young wizard"
- Magic Docs: files marked with "# MAGIC DOC:" are auto-updated by background agents
- Session slugs from whimsical word lists: "fuzzy-dancing-capybara"
- /stickers command: order physical merch from a CLI tool

## Source

- npm package: @anthropic-ai/claude-code v2.1.88
- Extracted from: cli.js.map (source map bundled with npm package)
- GitHub mirror: github.com/chatgptprojects/claude-code (commit 642c7f9)
- Language: TypeScript
- UI Framework: Ink (React for terminal)
- Internal codename: Tengu
- For educational and reference purposes only
